items: Roll Call
Welcome by the School Board President, Janet Lawson
Additions, Deletions, or Modifications to the Agenda
Approval of Agenda

If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on the links available under Public Content prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Public Hearing Regarding the Design-Build Agreements for Solar Photovoltaic Systems
Adoption of Resolution No. 8 and Approval of the Design-Build Agreements for Solar Photovoltaic Systems at 9 Sites

Adoption of Resolution No. 9 and Approval of Energy Services Agreement Between Redwood City School District and Southland Industries for the Purpose of Construction, Installation of Energy Efficiency Measures (lighting retrofit) on District Sites
Approval of Contracts with QKA Architects for Design Services for the Following Projects Adelante Selby, Hoover School, Roosevelt School, and Taft School HVAC Upgrades Projects
Approval of Consent Items
Approval of the October 23 Board Meeting Minutes

Approval of the Agreement between Redwood City School District and Mountain Valley Child and Family Services, Inc., to provide Non-Public School (NPS) and Residential Treatment Center (RTC) Services for the 2024-2025 School Year
Approval of Local Interagency Agreement to Provide Education and Training to Credential Candidates
Approval of Amendment No. 2 to the Agreement between William Gomez and the Redwood City School District
Second Reading and Approval of Board Policy 5145.6: Parent/Guardian Notifications
Second Reading and Approval of Board Policy 1113: District and School Websites
Second Reading and Approval of Board Policy 5113: Absences and Excuses
Second Reading and Approval of Board Policy 4033: Lactation Accommodation
Second Reading and Approval of Board Policy 6000: Concepts and Roles
Ratification of Warrant Registers, October 1, 2024 - October 31, 2024
Approval of Retirement Notification Incentive
Approval of Reclassification of Classified Employees
Adoption of Transitional Kindergarten Curriculum
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Contract Update Information and Credit Card Summary
Correspondence
Possible Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Meetings Calendar
Adjourn the Meeting

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 7.2 was moved from action to discussion item, placed after 6.1. This was announced at the start of the meeting during the 'Changes to the Agenda' section.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: I'll move to approve the consent agenda second all those in favor
